nasb.text: The young man did not delay to do the thing, because he was delighted with Jacob’s daughter. Now he was more respected than all the household of his father.

esv.text: And the young man did not delay to do the thing, because he delighted in Jacob’s daughter. Now he was the most honored of all his father’s house.

cnv.text: 那少年就立刻照著去作，因為他喜愛雅各的女兒；他在他父親的全家中又是最受尊敬的。

ccb.text: 示剑毫不迟延地照办，因为他热恋底娜。在哈抹家族中，他最受人尊重。

csbs.text: 那年轻人毫不迟延地去做这事，因为他很喜欢雅各的女儿。他在他父亲的家中最受人尊重。
